_comment: Phase B — extra provider instances (multiple subscriptions per provider). Point PROVIDER_INSTANCES_CONFIG at a copy of this file. Each entry adds an account ALONGSIDE the implicit default instance (whose id == the template name). Use the instance ids ('claude:work') as routing candidates. For CLI accounts, put cli_config_dir under $HOME (/home/agent) so it persists on the agent_home volume; then log in with: make auth p=claude:work
